Community Explorer App
│
├── 1. Community Selector
│   └── Dropdown or Map Click → Select a monastic community
│
├── 2. Community Profile Card
│   ├── Name, Order, Foundation Date, Location
│   ├── Status: Active / Dissolved / Transformed
│   └── Cause of Dissolution (if applicable)
│
├── 3. ESG / Impact Score
│   ├── Composite Score (0–100)
│   ├── Radar Chart: Environmental / Social / Governance
│   └── Band: Dark Green / Green / Amber / Red
│
├── 4. Order Protocol Card
│   ├── Order Name & Governance Rules
│   ├── Economic Model (Agriculture / Trade / Education)
│   └── Territorial Strategy (Frontier / Urban / Coastal)
│
├── 5. Sister Communities Panel
│   ├── Map: Nearest communities (same Order)
│   ├── Table: Name, Distance, Shared Period
│   └── Network Graph: Regional cluster visualization
│
├── 6. Economic Profile
│   ├── Land Area & Agricultural Output
│   ├── Revenue Sources (Tithes / Donations / Trade)
│   └── Timeline: Key economic events
│
└── 7. Historical Timeline
    ├── Foundation → Peak → Decline → Dissolution
    ├── Key Events (Wars, Reforms, Plagues)
    └── Architectural / Cultural Legacy
